_doc: Promotion-time baselines for the drift watchdog. Each strategy here was promoted via the strict walk-forward gate; live performance gets compared against these stats. Re-baseline whenever a strategy is intentionally re-tuned and re-promoted.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 60d/30d windows, 2/2 positive OOS, agg OOS Sharpe +5.71, DSR median 1.000, 100% pass fraction. Sweep winner: range=15m, rr=2.0, atr_stop=2.0, ema=200.
strategies._notes: Numbers from the IS+OOS combined trade list of the 2026-04-27 sweep run. n_trades = 28+13 (window 0 IS+OOS) + ... averaged across IS/OOS. Re-baseline once live paper-soak produces 50+ real fills.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 365d window, anchor_sweep (PDH/PDL/PMH/PML/ONH/ONL). 47 OOS trades, +$135 OOS PnL, 34.0% WR, +105% decay (acceptable), beats random baseline by $368. ALL FIVE LIGHTS GREEN. Reconfirmed on 2026-05-08 after data refresh; same shape as the 90d initial pass (50T, +$175, 32% WR, +133% decay).
strategies._notes: First MNQ-family ALL GREEN strategy through the elite-gate (rounds 2 + 7 of pre-live hardening sprint). avg_r approximated from $135 net / 47 trades / typical $50 risk-per-trade. Re-baseline once live paper-soak produces 50+ real fills with broker-side slippage.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 365d window. 4 OOS trades, +$496 OOS PnL, 75% WR, +488% decay. Strategy fires very rarely (low-frequency edge — sample size won't reach 30 even on 365d).
strategies._notes: Sample-size YELLOW; kept as shadow_benchmark not promoted to paper_soak. Operator decision on whether the low-freq edge is worth wiring live with reduced size, or whether to relax entry conditions to fire more often. Re-baseline if entry conditions change.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 90d window. 31 OOS trades, $-2,133 OOS PnL, 9.7% WR, -32% decay. Round-4 elite-gate: bug-fix (rr_absurd cap) eliminated 6 validator-rejected signals but exposed strategy as no-edge once all 31 trades pass.
strategies._notes: WARN: production_candidate tag predates the elite-gate; empirical results show no edge. Operator should consider demoting to research_candidate or retiring. Baseline persisted so drift watchdog has a comparison anchor; do NOT use these numbers as a promotion target.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: NQ1/5m, baseline placeholder. NQ-variant of vol_prof_mnq; not independently elite-gate verified yet. Inherits vol_prof_mnq's structural risk (parent showed no edge).
strategies._notes: Placeholder baseline to unblock launch check. Run elite-gate on NQ1/5m before relying on these numbers; vol_prof family has open questions on edge reality.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MYM1/1h, 624d window. Strict-gate audit (eta_engine/reports/strict_gate_mym.json): n=11 trades, sharpe=8.62, expR_net=+0.672, sh_def=-0.12, split=True, L=true (legacy gate pass), S=false (strict gate fail on n<30). Per-trade quality is the highest in the entire fleet; sample-size limited.
strategies._notes: MICRO-TIER CANDIDATE 2026-05-08 per operator directive (switching to micros for limited starting capital). MYM ~$25k notional fits $10k per-bot budget, but it is intentionally not supervisor-pinned until canonical MYM1_1h.csv and MYM1_5m.csv are present under C:\EvolutionaryTradingAlgo\mnq_data\history and paper_live_launch_check reports no data block. Re-baseline once 30+ real paper fills land. avg_r approximated from expR_net since strict-gate uses friction-net per-trade R.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MCL1/1h, 2yr window post-fetch (11,529 bars). Strict-gate audit (strict_gate_mgc_mcl_v2.json): n=16, sharpe=2.00, expR_net=+0.111, sh_def=-1.39, split=True, L=true. Profile mirrors mnq_anchor_sweep (already pinned). MCL micro friction (10x less than full CL) unlocks the energy-reflexivity edge that cl_sweep_reclaim couldn't deliver.
strategies._notes: MICRO-TIER PIN 2026-05-08. Micro WTI Crude rehab path for retired cl_sweep_reclaim. Re-baseline once 30+ live fills land; current avg_r is from expR_net. First live ENTRY landed 07:45 UTC at $94.82.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MGC1/1h, 16mo window post-fetch (11,350 bars). Strict-gate audit (strict_gate_mgc_mcl_v2.json): n=7, sharpe=1.72, expR_net=+0.124, sh_def=-1.61, split=False. Strategy fires once per ~70 days on gold; below the cadence floor. NOT pinned in supervisor; baseline kept so drift watchdog has anchor if re-tuned.
strategies._notes: Did NOT pin. Gold structure may not suit this preset. Future paths: try 4h timeframe, relax min_wick_pct 0.40 to 0.30, or replace with momentum strategy. Baseline persisted for drift comparison if a tuned variant is added later.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: 6E1/1h, full history. Strict-gate audit (round-3): n=25, sharpe=3.34, expR_net=+0.219, sh_def=-0.88, split=True. Pinned in 7-bot post-correction roster. FX (EUR/USD futures) sweep on 1h bars; reasonable per-trade quality with split-stable signal.
strategies._notes: Pinned 2026-05-08 in 9-bot active roster. Re-baseline once 30+ live fills land. avg_r from expR_net.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: M2K1/1h, full history. Strict-gate audit (round-3): n=23, sharpe=4.66, expR_net=+0.361, sh_def=-0.52, split=True. Russell 2000 micro futures sweep on 1h bars. Pinned in 7-bot post-correction roster.
strategies._notes: Pinned 2026-05-08 in 9-bot active roster. Small-cap leadership at risk-on inflection points. Re-baseline once 30+ live fills land.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: NG1/1h baseline placeholder. Pre-fix audit showed sharpe 8.31 but registry comment flags 65 rollover-jump bars (>5% adjacent-close jumps) as data-quality artifacts. Strategy is sound; data needs continuous-front-month re-fetch with rollover skipping before honest audit.
strategies._notes: Placeholder until NG1 data is re-fetched with rollover handling per docs/STRATEGY_REHAB_PLAN.md tier-2. Strategy persisted for drift watchdog completeness.

strategies._full_history_smoke: 2026-04-29 positive-price-filtered full-history smoke: 487,725/490,103 tradable MNQ1 5m bars, 83 windows, 28/83 positive OOS, agg IS Sharpe -0.707, agg OOS Sharpe -2.958, degradation 51.8%, DSR median 0.000, DSR pass 13.2%, strict gate FAIL. A targeted full-history retune checked five serious ORB alternatives; best checked OOS remained negative (-2.368, DSR pass 25.3%). This supersedes any interpretation of v2 as promotion-grade; keep it as a plain-ORB shadow benchmark only while mnq_orb_sage_v1 remains the stronger READY MNQ lane.
strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m latest 20k imported bars, 60d/30d windows, 1/2 positive OOS, agg OOS Sharpe +1.788, DSR median 0.651, 50% pass fraction. Latest-slice retune: range=5m, rr=3.0, atr_stop=1.5, ema=50. Strict gate remains FAIL because pass fraction is exactly 50% and the second OOS fold only fired one trade.
strategies._notes: Shadow/diagnostic baseline only, not a live or paper promotion candidate. Persisted so drift checks and launch readiness keep the known-bad plain ORB lane visible without blocking OP-16. Full latest-20k combined backtest: 50 trades, 20.0% win rate, avg R -0.2593, max DD 18.306%, total return -12.6815%; the improvement is OOS-slice relative to the prior latest-slice smoke, not a complete production promotion.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: Identical numbers to mnq_orb_v1 — ORB is symbol-agnostic on liquid index futures, NQ1 5m matched MNQ1 5m exactly across both windows.
strategies._notes: Re-baseline separately once NQ paper-soak diverges from MNQ in live data.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 60d/30d windows, 2/2 positive OOS, agg OOS Sharpe +10.061 (vs plain ORB +5.71 — ~2x improvement), DSR median 1.000, 100% pass fraction. Sweep winner: range=15m, sage min_conviction=0.65, min_alignment=0.55, lookback=200 bars.
strategies._notes: OOS > IS in both windows (W0: IS +1.61 / OOS +12.39; W1: IS +3.90 / OOS +7.73) — sage filter cuts more losers than winners on OOS, the opposite of overfitting. n_trades inferred from W0+W1 IS+OOS = 13+7 + 24+5 = 49. Trade count is low; paper-soak validation required before live promotion. Re-baseline once paper-soak produces 50+ real fills.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d, 9 windows. Ensemble vote across regime_trend + regime_trend+ETF + sage-daily-gated. min_agreement=2 of 3. Agg OOS Sharpe **+5.95** (tied with sage-daily +6.00) but **94 OOS trades** (32% more than sage-daily's 71). 8/9 +OOS, DSR median 1.000, 89% pass, gate PASS. SECOND BTC strategy to clear the strict gate; trade-count-max counterpart to sage-daily's Sharpe-max.
strategies._notes: n_trades = sum across 9 windows IS+OOS = ~188 (avg ~21/window). Per-window OOS Sharpes follow the sage-daily pattern but with broader trade base. Operator choice between ensemble (more trades, faster paper-soak validation) and sage-daily (max single-strategy Sharpe). Both pass the strict gate; either is promotable.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d, 9 windows. Strategy = crypto_regime_trend + ETF flow filter + sage 22-school composite at DAILY cadence as directional veto (conv>=0.50, loose mode). Agg OOS Sharpe **+6.00** (vs plain regime_trend +2.96, ETF-only +4.28). 8/9 +OOS, DSR median 1.000, 89% pass, deg_avg 0.30 (PASSES 0.35 cap), gate PASS. FIRST BTC strategy to clear the strict walk-forward gate on this codebase.
strategies._notes: n_trades = sum across 9 windows IS+OOS = ~142 (avg ~16/window). Per-window OOS Sharpes: +8.42, +10.75, +10.14, +1.64, +3.98, -4.19, +3.63, +8.41, +11.25. The W5 regime-shift outlier was -11.83 in prior strategies; sage's daily directional read cuts it to -4.19. Breakthrough = running sage at the right cadence (daily) instead of layering it on individual 1h bars. Paper-soak validation is the next gate before live promotion.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d, 9 windows: agg OOS Sharpe +4.276 (vs plain regime_trend +2.962 — 44% Sharpe lift), 8/9 +OOS, DSR median 1.000, 89% pass fraction, 79 OOS trades. Best single-filter result on this codebase. Strict gate FAIL only on deg_avg=0.407 > 0.35 cap, driven by W5 (-4.79 OOS) — a single regime-shift outlier.
strategies._notes: Promoted on 2026-04-27 user directive 'wire those feeds then'. Filter: regime_trend baseline + ETF flow direction gate (long requires Farside aggregate spot-BTC daily inflow > 0). The user's BTC-driver write-up flagged ETF flows as the dominant 2025-2026 driver; the data validates that thesis. n_trades = sum across 9 windows IS+OOS = ~121 (avg ~13.4 per window). Per-window OOS Sharpes: +8.42, +8.54, +10.14, +1.64, +1.72, -4.79, +3.63, +2.20, +6.97. Without W5 the strategy decisively passes every gate criterion. Promote to live only after paper-soak + a regime-shift-aware risk cap that limits W5-style drawdowns.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: NQ1/5m, 60d/30d windows, 2/2 positive OOS, agg OOS Sharpe +8.288, DSR median 0.997, 100% pass fraction. Same MNQ winning config (conv=0.65, align=0.55, range=15m) — sage overlay transfers symbol-agnostically across liquid index futures.
strategies._notes: OOS > IS in both windows (W0: IS +0.69 / OOS +3.35; W1: IS +2.55 / OOS +13.23). Lower magnitude than MNQ (+8.29 vs +10.06) but same direction — sage's lift is real and generalizes. n_trades inferred from W0+W1 IS+OOS = 16+9 + 29+4 = 58. Same paper-soak gate as mnq_orb_sage_v1 applies.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: MNQ1/5m, 60d/30d, 2 windows, agg OOS Sharpe +2.291 (vs original sage_consensus -1.15 — sage as entry signal works at restrictive conv=0.75). W0: IS +9.17 / OOS +4.58 (4 trades); W1: IS +5.02 / OOS 0 (2 trades, min_trades_met=False). DSR median 0.651, DSR pass 50%. Gate FAIL only because W1 has <5 trades. Best cell from 60-cell sweep: conv=0.75, align=0.70, cooldown=12, max=1.
strategies._notes: Research candidate, not promoted to live. n_trades = W0+W1 IS+OOS = 3+4+10+2 = 19 across 107 days. Promote to live once MNQ 5m data extends past ~6 months and window count grows from 2 to 6+. The flipped-success demonstrates pure sage CAN be an entry signal — but only with very strict thresholds + sparse firing.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: DEPRECATED 2026-04-27 by btc_corb_v3. v2 was promoted on a 1y BTC tape (90d/30d windows -> 9 windows). When the tape was extended to 5y the same config (range=120m / atr=3.0 / rr=2.5) no longer cleared the strict gate (DSR pass dropped from 66.7% to 43-49% across the wider param sweep). Small-sample artifact — kept here as the cautionary example.
strategies._notes: Replaced by btc_corb_v3 with longer windows (365d/90d) on the 5y sample. See docs/research_log/2026-04-27_fleet_optimization_summary.md.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 365d/90d windows, 16 windows, 14/16 +OOS. Agg IS Sharpe +0.430, agg OOS Sharpe +1.948, deg 20.0%, DSR median 0.801, 56.2% fold pass. Strict gate PASS on the new 5y tape. Round-2 fleet sweep winner: range=120m, atr_stop_mult=3.0, rr_target=1.5 (tighter rr than v2's 2.5 — monetizes more breakouts in 5y of mixed-regime data).
strategies._notes: Stats from full-period backtest at the promoted config: 1800 days (5y) BTC 1h Coinbase spot bars, 332 trades, win rate 45.5%, avg +0.14R, expectancy +0.14R, total return +54.4%, max DD 17.5%, Sharpe 1.77. Replaces v2 — DD is higher (17.5% vs 4.9%) but the 5y sample includes 2022 bear regimes, the lower DD on v2 was 1y-bull-leaning. Pre-live IBKR/CME drift-check via scripts/compare_coinbase_vs_ibkr still required.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: NQ1/D, 365d/180d windows, 53 windows, 32/53 +OOS (60.4% positive). Agg IS Sharpe +1.872, agg OOS Sharpe +9.272, aggregate-level deg 0.0% (OOS > IS = improvement, not degradation), DSR 1.000. Long-haul gate PASS (per-fold DSR replaced with positive-fold-fraction since daily-cadence folds fire too few trades for stable per-fold DSR). Sweep winner: atr_stop_mult=2.0, rr_target=2.0, ema_bias_period=50 (faster bias than the default 200 catches 21st-century NQ regime shifts).
strategies._notes: Stats from full-period backtest at the promoted config: 27 years (~9800 days) NQ1 daily, 284 trades, win rate 40.5%, avg +0.21R, expectancy +0.21R, total return +76.8%, max DD 12.5%, Sharpe 2.28. Highest OOS Sharpe of any production strategy. Long-haul gate is the right shape for daily-cadence bots: each OOS fold has 3-8 trades — insufficient for stable per-fold DSR, but the 53-fold pos-fraction (60.4%) is exactly the kind of evidence walk-forward should accept. Runs alongside intraday nq_futures ORB on uncorrelated edge; pair correlation should stay low since one fires on 5m breakouts while this fires on D breakouts.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: ETH/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows, 8/9 +OOS. Agg IS Sharpe +0.212, agg OOS Sharpe +16.104, deg 27.8%, DSR median 1.000, 88.9% fold pass. Strict gate PASS — second crypto promotion the framework has produced (first ETH PASS). Round-1 fleet sweep winner: range=60m, atr_stop_mult=3.0, rr_target=2.0. Tighter range (60m) than the prior eth_corb_v2 attempt (120m) makes ETH 1h breakouts qualify more often on session transitions; with atr=3.0 the wider stop absorbs noise that killed earlier configs' IS.
strategies._notes: Stats from full-period backtest: 360 days ETH 1h Coinbase spot bars, 73 trades, win rate 41.1%, avg +0.23R, expectancy +0.23R, total return +17.6%, max DD 9.6%, Sharpe 2.49. ETH OOS Sharpe of +16.1 is the highest the framework has seen; small-sample caveat (9 windows) — re-baseline once data extends to 720d+. Pre-live IBKR/CME drift-check via scripts/compare_coinbase_vs_ibkr still required. Devils-advocate caveat: '+16 OOS will not stay at +16 in live; expect mean-reversion to ~+5 range.'

strategies._walk_forward_summary: ETH/1h latest imported 720d tape, 90d/30d windows, 12/21 positive OOS, agg IS Sharpe +0.506, agg OOS Sharpe +1.929, degradation 33.3%, DSR median 0.646, 52.4% pass fraction. Registered-anchor retest: range=180m, atr_stop=1.5, rr=1.0. Strict gate PASS under the registry's min_trades_per_window=3 policy.
strategies._notes: Production candidate with half-size warmup. Persisted so drift checks and launch readiness compare the retuned ETH assignment honestly. Full latest-20k combined backtest: 142 trades, 51.41% win rate, avg R +0.0282, max DD 11.6269%, total return +3.3450%. Pre-live IBKR/CME drift-check via scripts/compare_coinbase_vs_ibkr still required.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows, agg OOS Sharpe +3.157 (vs plain crypto_orb +2.73 — sage adds +0.43), 6/9 positive OOS, DSR median 0.832, DSR pass 56%. Gate FAIL on engine secondary criteria (deg_avg=0.70 > 0.35 and 2 of 9 windows have <5 OOS trades). Best cell from 2026-04-27 180-cell crypto sage sweep: conv=0.40, align=0.50, range=30m, sage_lookback=200, instrument_class=crypto.
strategies._notes: Research candidate, not promoted to live. Sage overlay does add OOS Sharpe over plain crypto_orb but trade volume per OOS window is uneven (some windows fire 8 trades, others 2). Promote to live once data extends to ~720d (so 9 windows -> 18+ windows and per-window trade variance averages out). The conv=0.65 thresholds that won on MNQ produce numerical blowup on BTC (-2.7e15) due to over-filtering; the working crypto cell needs conv ~0.40 — much more permissive.

strategies._latest_walk_forward_summary: ETH/1h ELITE lab retest 2026-05-05: 370 trades, 52.7% win rate, Sharpe +0.859, profit factor 1.114, max DD 19.0%, pass_reason=all gates passed. This supersedes the 2026-04-29 research-only snapshot and promotes the strategy into the paper-soak lane.
strategies._latest_notes: Paper-soak candidate. The latest Strategy Lab report at reports/lab_reports/eth_sage_daily/eth_corb_sage_daily_v1_lab_report.json cleared the current gate set and aligns with the 2026-05-05 ELITE scoreboard decision that retired eth_perp in favor of eth_sage_daily. Keep the historical strict-gate notes below as audit context only.
strategies._historical_note: The legacy _walk_forward_summary/_notes fields below are the original 2026-04-27 360d snapshot retained for comparison; latest_* fields supersede them.
strategies._walk_forward_summary: ETH/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows. Strategy = crypto_orb(range=120m, ATR=3.0, RR=2.5) + sage 22-school composite at DAILY cadence as directional veto (strict mode, conv>=0.40). Agg IS Sharpe +2.46 (vs -0.86 plain crypto_orb baseline — sage flipped IS positive), agg OOS Sharpe **+5.77** (vs +1.38 baseline — 4x lift). 6/9 +OOS, DSR median 0.992, DSR pass 66.7%, deg_avg 0.73 (FAIL the 0.35 cap). Per-window OOS Sharpes: +12.09, +14.74, +4.81, +9.81, +10.85, -15.14, +14.74, 0.00, 0.00.
strategies._notes: Research candidate, not promoted to live. ETH lacks ETF flow data so we can't run the BTC formula end-to-end (regime_trend + ETF + sage_daily). Substituting crypto_orb for regime_trend works because ETH's crypto_orb baseline already passes; sage daily gate adds +4.4 OOS Sharpe on top. Gate FAIL on two single-trade-window blowups (W7=2, W8=1) plus W5 regime-shift outlier (-15.14). The +5.77 result is real and IS-positive (resolves the prior eth_corb_v2 promotion blocker), but the strict gate's deg_avg cap and min_trades_met floor need either more data (currently 360d) or a circuit breaker. n_trades = sum across 9 windows IS+OOS = ~89.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows. crypto_regime_trend (regime_ema=100, pullback_ema=21, tol=3pct, atr=2.0, rr=3.0). Agg OOS Sharpe +2.96, 7/9 +OOS, DSR median 1.000, 67pct pass, 91 OOS trades. Strict gate FAILS on a single regime-shift outlier window (-4.19) but the strategy is sound across all other folds.
strategies._notes: Baseline preserved for drift comparison even though gate technically fails. Used as the underlying for btc_regime_trend_etf_v1 (which adds the ETF flow filter and DOES pass the gate).

strategies._walk_forward_summary: SOL/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows. crypto_orb tuned for SOL volatility (range=120m, ATR=3.5, RR=2.5). Agg OOS Sharpe +2.34, 7/9 +OOS, 78pct DSR pass, 104 OOS trades. Strict gate FAIL on deg_avg.
strategies._notes: SOL is materially more volatile than BTC/ETH; baseline ATR-stop and RR are widened accordingly. n_trades = sum IS+OOS across 9 windows (~104). Re-baseline once SOL ETF or sentiment data wires.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: SOL/1h canonical imported tape, 90d/30d windows, 21 windows. Deployed-risk retune: crypto_orb(range=240m, atr_stop=1.25, rr=2.5, max 1 trade/day). 12/21 positive OOS, agg IS Sharpe -0.306, agg OOS Sharpe +2.489, DSR median 0.990, 52.4% pass fraction, degradation 19.1%. Strict gate remains FAIL because aggregate IS is still negative, but this improves the prior registered cell (+1.317 OOS, 42.9% DSR pass) and replaces the v1 latest-slice result of agg OOS Sharpe -4.761.
strategies._notes: Shadow benchmark only, not final live promotion. Persisted so drift checks and launch readiness compare the retuned SOL assignment honestly without treating it as a launch blocker. Full current combined backtest over 17275 SOL 1h bars: 117 trades, 29.06% win rate, avg R +0.0171, profit factor 1.0065, Sharpe 0.1700, max DD 15.3913%, total return +0.5383%.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: DCA accumulator on BTC daily — buys steadily at any non-distressed score. Daily timeframe matches accumulation cadence. NO walk-forward edge metric applies; goal is exposure not edge.
strategies._notes: DCA is a SIZING discipline, not an edge strategy. No Sharpe ratio, no win rate. Drift watchdog should flag if the DCA bot stops firing (e.g. score-threshold drift) or starts firing during distressed-score windows (e.g. confluence-scorer drift).

strategies._walk_forward_summary: ETH/1h, 90d/30d windows, 9 windows. compression_breakout with ETH preset (BB-width pct cap 0.30, RR 2.0, ATR-stop 1.8x, trend-EMA 200, vol-z 0.4, close-loc 0.65). Agg IS Sharpe +1.63, agg OOS Sharpe +3.86, gate PASS. 54 OOS trades = ~6 trades/window.
strategies._notes: ONLY cell of the 10-cell foundation supercharge sweep to clear the strict DSR gate. Both IS and OOS positive (resolves the trap that blocked many earlier promotions). Half-size 30-day warmup_policy applied.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: BTC/1h, 90d/30d windows, 21 windows on the canonical imported tape. compression_breakout with tight knobs (vol_z=1.0, close_loc=0.80, cooldown=24, rr=2.5). Agg IS Sharpe -1.034, agg OOS Sharpe +0.139, 105 OOS trades, 47.6pct DSR pass. Gate FAIL: positive-but-near-flat OOS, negative IS, and below the 50pct DSR pass gate.
strategies._notes: SHADOW BENCHMARK. The legacy 5y +2.30 OOS snapshot is no longer the active truth surface. Current canonical retest keeps BTC compression as diagnostic-only while stronger BTC lanes carry launch readiness. Reconsider only after provider-backed retest clears positive IS+OOS and the 50pct DSR pass-fraction gate.

strategies._walk_forward_summary: XRP perp bot deactivated 2026-04-27. No active strategy assigned.
strategies._notes: Placeholder baseline so registry-sync tests pass. Re-enable by switching strategy_id and re-baselining.
